strengths: Completed the task in 140 seconds, demonstrating good speed control
Successfully executed all required phases including proper traction setup and circle release
Maintained consistent cutting motion throughout most of the circle
weaknesses: Cut path deviated outside the marked circle boundary during the circle following phase
Inconsistent precision in maintaining the circular template line

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing at each quarter to verify alignment before continuing.
drills.targets_weakness: Cut path deviation outside the marked circle boundary.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and maintain optimal cutting trajectory.
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent precision in maintaining the circular template line.

progression_note: At the advanced level, focus on eliminating the line deviation penalty while maintaining your current speed. Precision refinement is key to achieving benchmark performance with minimal deductions.
